name: Planned Classical and Inter-IISER Tournaments
description: In the future, we are planning classical tournaments and inter-IISER tournaments.

name: Outdoor Chess Event
description: Students and faculty played friendly matches in an outdoor chess event.

name: Inter-Batch Team Chess Tournament
description: An inter-batch 5v5 chess tournament was played in March 2026, with four open boards and one female board.

name: Bughouse Chess Tournament at Insomnia
description: A bughouse chess tournament was organized during Insomnia, the cultural fest of IISER Mohali, with participation from students across multiple colleges.

name: Talk on Chess Opening Principles and Middlegame Strategy
description: Arkish Chakraborty (MS21) delivered a talk on chess opening principles and middlegame strategy.

name: Casual Meet
description: Another casual meet brought students together for friendly matches.

name: Winter Online Tournament
description: A winter online tournament was held on Lichess for club members.

name: Casual Meet
description: Friendly over-the-board matches were played in a relaxed meet with students.
